const encodeBase64 = (value)=>{
    if ("TURBOPACK compile-time falsy", 0) //TURBOPACK unreachable
    ;
    try {
        const bytes = new TextEncoder().encode(value);
        let binary = "";
        bytes.forEach((byte)=>{
            binary += String.fromCharCode(byte);
        });
        return window.btoa(binary);
    } catch  {
        return "";
    }
};
const resolveAdminLoginUrl = ()=>{
    const fallback = `${("TURBOPACK compile-time value", "http://localhost:5173")}/sign-in?redirect=%2F`;
    const raw = (("TURBOPACK compile-time value", "http://localhost:5173") ?? fallback).trim();
    try {
        return new URL(raw);
    } catch  {
        const sanitized = raw.replace(/^\/+/, "");
        const looksLikeHostPath = sanitized.includes("localhost:") || /^[a-z0-9.-]+\.[a-z]{2,}/i.test(sanitized);
        if (looksLikeHostPath) {
            try {
                return new URL(`http://${sanitized}`);
            } catch  {
            // Ignore and continue.
            }
        }
        if ("TURBOPACK compile-time truthy", 1) {
            try {
                return new URL(raw, window.location.origin);
            } catch  {
            // Ignore and use fallback.
            }
        }
        try {
            return new URL(fallback);
        } catch  {
            return null;
        }
    }
};
const buildAdminAutoLoginUrl = ({ token, vendor, redirectPath = "/profile" })=>{
    const url = resolveAdminLoginUrl();
    if (!url) return adminLoginUrl;
    try {
        if (url.pathname === "/") {
            url.pathname = "/sign-in";
        }
        const safeVendor = vendor && typeof vendor === "object" ? vendor : {};
        const normalizedRole = String(safeVendor.role || "vendor").trim().toLowerCase();
        const userPayload = {
            ...safeVendor,
            role: normalizedRole || "vendor"
        };
        const encodedUser = encodeBase64(JSON.stringify(userPayload));
        url.searchParams.set("redirect", redirectPath || "/profile");
        url.searchParams.set("autologin", "1");
        url.searchParams.set("authtoken", token);
        if (encodedUser) {
            url.searchParams.set("authuser", encodedUser);
        }
        return url.toString();
    } catch  {
        return adminLoginUrl;
    }
};
const isEmailStep = (stage)=>stage === "email-entry" || stage === "email-otp";
const getStepTone = (status)=>{
    if (status === "complete") {
        return {
            accent: "border-slate-950",
            label: "text-slate-500",
            note: "text-slate-500",
            title: "text-slate-950"
        };
    }
    if (status === "current") {
        return {
            accent: "border-violet-700",
            label: "text-violet-700",
            note: "text-violet-700",
            title: "text-slate-950"
        };
    }
    return {
        accent: "border-slate-200",
        label: "text-slate-400",
        note: "text-slate-400",
        title: "text-slate-500"
    };
};
const validateWhatsAppNumber = (digits, country)=>{
    if (!country) {
        return {
            isValid: false,
            message: "Select a country code to continue."
        };
    }
    if (!digits) {
        return {
            isValid: false,
            message: "Enter your WhatsApp number to continue."
        };
    }
    const normalizedDigits = digits.replace(/\D/g, "");
    const normalizedCountryCode = country.code.toUpperCase();
    if (normalizedCountryCode === "IN") {
        if (!/^[6-9]\d{9}$/.test(normalizedDigits)) {
            return {
                isValid: false,
                message: "Enter a valid Indian WhatsApp mobile number."
            };
        }
        return {
            isValid: true,
            message: ""
        };
    }
    if ((0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$libphonenumber$2d$js$2f$min$2f$exports$2f$isSupportedCountry$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["isSupportedCountry"])(normalizedCountryCode)) {
        const parsedNumber = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$libphonenumber$2d$js$2f$min$2f$exports$2f$parsePhoneNumber$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__$3c$export__parsePhoneNumber__as__parsePhoneNumberFromString$3e$__["parsePhoneNumberFromString"])(normalizedDigits, normalizedCountryCode);
        if (parsedNumber?.isValid()) {
            return {
                isValid: true,
                message: ""
            };
        }
        return {
            isValid: false,
            message: `Enter a valid WhatsApp number for ${country.name}.`
        };
    }
    if (normalizedDigits.length < 6 || normalizedDigits.length > 15) {
        return {
            isValid: false,
            message: `Enter a valid WhatsApp number for ${country.name}.`
        };
    }
    return {
        isValid: true,
        message: ""
    };
};
function VendorRegistrationPage() {
    _s();

    (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useEffect"])({
        "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect": ()=>{
            let isMounted = true;
            const controller = new AbortController();
            const loadCountries = {
                "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.loadCountries": async ()=>{
                    setCountriesLoading(true);
                    setCountriesError(null);
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch("/api/countries", {
                            signal: controller.signal
                        });
                        const payload = await response.json();
                        if (!response.ok) {
                            throw new Error(payload?.message ?? "Unable to load countries right now.");
                        }
                        if (!isMounted) return;
                        const nextCountries = Array.isArray(payload) ? payload : [];
                        const metaRaw = ("TURBOPACK compile-time truthy", 1) ? sessionStorage.getItem(VENDOR_REG_META_KEY) : "TURBOPACK unreachable";
                        const meta = metaRaw ? JSON.parse(metaRaw) : null;
                        const draftRaw = ("TURBOPACK compile-time truthy", 1) ? sessionStorage.getItem(VENDOR_REG_DRAFT_KEY) : "TURBOPACK unreachable";
                        const draft = draftRaw ? JSON.parse(draftRaw) : null;
                        const storedCountryCode = draft?.countryCode ?? meta?.countryCode ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_country_code") ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_country_code") ?? "";
                        const storedPhone = draft?.phone ?? meta?.phone ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_phone") ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_phone") ?? "";
                        const storedEmail = draft?.email ?? meta?.email ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_email") ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_email") ?? "";
                        const storedStep = draft?.stage ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_registration_step") ?? sessionStorage.getItem("vendor_registration_step");
                        const initialCountry = nextCountries.find({
                            "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.loadCountries": (country_0)=>country_0.dialCode === storedCountryCode
                        }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.loadCountries"]) ?? nextCountries.find({
                            "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.loadCountries": (country)=>country.code === "IN"
                        }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.loadCountries"]) ?? nextCountries[0] ?? null;
                        setCountries(nextCountries);
                        setSelectedCountry(initialCountry);
                        setEmail(storedEmail);
                        if (draft?.phoneOtp?.length === 6) setPhoneOtp(draft.phoneOtp);
                        if (draft?.emailOtp?.length === 6) setEmailOtp(draft.emailOtp);
                        if (typeof draft?.phoneTimer === "number") setPhoneTimer(draft.phoneTimer);
                        if (typeof draft?.canResendPhoneOtp === "boolean") {
                            setCanResendPhoneOtp(draft.canResendPhoneOtp);
                        }
                        if (storedPhone) {
                            const activeDialCode = storedCountryCode || initialCountry?.dialCode || "";
                            const localPhone = activeDialCode && storedPhone.startsWith(activeDialCode) ? storedPhone.slice(activeDialCode.length) : storedPhone;
                            setPhone(localPhone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 15));
                        }
                        if ((storedStep === "email-entry" || storedStep === "email-otp") && storedPhone && storedEmail) {
                            setStage(storedStep);
                        } else if (storedStep === "email-entry" && storedPhone) {
                            setStage("email-entry");
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        if (!isMounted || controller.signal.aborted) return;
                        setCountries([]);
                        setCountriesError(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unable to load countries right now.");
                    } finally{
                        if (isMounted && !controller.signal.aborted) {
                            setCountriesLoading(false);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.loadCountries"];
            void loadCountries();
            return ({
                "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect": ()=>{
                    isMounted = false;
                    controller.abort();
                }
            })["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"];
        }
    }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"], [
        countryRequestNonce
    ]);
    (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useEffect"])({
        "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect": ()=>{
            if ("TURBOPACK compile-time falsy", 0) //TURBOPACK unreachable
            ;
            const dialCode = selectedCountry?.dialCode ?? "";
            const fullPhone = dialCode ? `${dialCode}${phone}` : phone;
            const metaPayload = {
                countryCode: dialCode,
                phone: fullPhone,
                email: email.trim()
            };
            const draftPayload = {
                stage,
                countryCode: dialCode,
                phone: fullPhone,
                email: email.trim(),

                emailOtp,
                phoneTimer,
                canResendPhoneOtp
            };

            sessionStorage.setItem(VENDOR_REG_DRAFT_KEY, JSON.stringify(draftPayload));
            if (dialCode) {
                sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_country_code", dialCode);
                sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_country_code", dialCode);
            }
            if (fullPhone.trim()) {
                sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_phone", fullPhone);
                sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_phone", fullPhone);
            }
            if (email.trim()) {
                sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_email", email.trim());
                sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_email", email.trim());
            }
            sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_registration_step", stage);
            sessionStorage.setItem("vendor_registration_step", stage);
        }
    }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"], [
        selectedCountry,
        phone,
        email,
        stage,

        emailOtp,

    ]);
    (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useEffect"])({
        "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect": ()=>{
            const handleOutsideClick = {
                "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.handleOutsideClick": (event)=>{

                        setIsCountryMenuOpen(false);

            }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.handleOutsideClick"];

            })["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"];

    }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"], []);
    (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useEffect"])({

        isCountryMenuOpen
    ]);
    (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useEffect"])({
        "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect": ()=>{
            if (stage === "phone-otp" && phoneTimer > 0) {
                const countdown = setInterval({
                    "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.countdown": ()=>setPhoneTimer({
                            "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.countdown": (value)=>value - 1
                        }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.countdown"])
                }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect.countdown"], 1000);
                return ({
                    "VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect": ()=>clearInterval(countdown)
                })["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"];
            }
            if (stage === "phone-otp" && phoneTimer === 0) {
                setCanResendPhoneOtp(true);
            }
        }
    }["VendorRegistrationPage.useEffect"], [
        stage,
        phoneTimer
    ]);
    const filteredCountries = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useMemo"])({
        "VendorRegistrationPage.useMemo[filteredCountries]": ()=>{
            const query = countryQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
            if (!query) return countries;
            return countries.filter({
                "VendorRegistrationPage.useMemo[filteredCountries]": (country_1)=>`${country_1.name} ${country_1.dialCode} ${country_1.code}`.toLowerCase().includes(query)
            }["VendorRegistrationPage.useMemo[filteredCountries]"]);
        }
    }["VendorRegistrationPage.useMemo[filteredCountries]"], [
        countries,
        countryQuery
    ]);
    const phoneDigits = phone.replace(/\D/g, "");
    const phoneOtpValue = phoneOtp.join("");
    const emailOtpValue = emailOtp.join("");
    const phoneDialCode = selectedCountry?.dialCode ?? "";
    const phoneValidation = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$next$2f$dist$2f$compiled$2f$react$2f$index$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["useMemo"])({
        "VendorRegistrationPage.useMemo[phoneValidation]": ()=>validateWhatsAppNumber(phoneDigits, selectedCountry)
    }["VendorRegistrationPage.useMemo[phoneValidation]"], [
        phoneDigits,
        selectedCountry
    ]);
    const isPhoneValid = phoneValidation.isValid;
    const isEmailValid = emailPattern.test(email.trim());
    const currentEmailStep = isEmailStep(stage);
    const heroTitle = currentEmailStep ? "Verify your email address." : "Verify your WhatsApp number.";
    const heroDescription = currentEmailStep ? "Your WhatsApp number is verified. Complete email verification and then continue inside your seller dashboard profile." : "Start with WhatsApp verification. International numbers are supported, then continue to email verification before entering the dashboard.";
    const panelStepLabel = currentEmailStep ? "Step 2 of 2" : "Step 1 of 2";
    const panelTitle = currentEmailStep ? stage === "email-otp" ? "Enter email OTP" : "Email verification" : stage === "phone-otp" ? "Enter WhatsApp OTP" : "WhatsApp verification";
    const panelDescription = currentEmailStep ? "Use the inbox that should receive onboarding approvals, compliance follow-up, and account recovery messages." : "Use the number that should receive onboarding updates, login recovery, and registration support messages.";
    const stepItems = [
        {
            label: "Step 1",
            note: currentEmailStep ? "Completed" : "Current step",
            status: currentEmailStep ? "complete" : "current",
            title: currentEmailStep ? "WhatsApp number verified" : "Verify WhatsApp number with OTP"
        },
        {
            label: "Step 2",
            note: currentEmailStep ? "Current step" : "Next",
            status: currentEmailStep ? "current" : "pending",
            title: currentEmailStep && stage === "email-otp" ? "Confirm email OTP" : "Verify email address"
        },
        {
            label: "Next",
            note: "Dashboard",
            status: "pending",
            title: "Complete business profile from your sellers dashboard"
        }
    ];
    const focusPhoneOtpInput = (index)=>{
        const input = phoneOtpRefs.current[index];
        if (input) input.focus();
    };
    const resetPhoneOtpState = ()=>{
        setPhoneOtp([
            ...emptyPhoneOtp
        ]);
        setPhoneTimer(30);
        setCanResendPhoneOtp(false);
    };
    const resetEmailOtpState = ()=>{
        setEmailOtp([
            ...emptyEmailOtp
        ]);
    };
    const getFullPhoneDigits = ()=>{
        const dialCodeDigits = phoneDialCode.replace(/\D/g, "");
        return `${dialCodeDigits}${phoneDigits}`;
    };
    const handlePhoneChange = (event_0)=>{
        const value_0 = event_0.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "");
        setPhone(value_0.slice(0, 15));
    };
    const handlePhoneOtpChange = (value_1, index_0)=>{
        if (!/^[0-9]?$/.test(value_1)) return;
        const nextOtp = [
            ...phoneOtp
        ];
        nextOtp[index_0] = value_1;
        setPhoneOtp(nextOtp);
        if (value_1 && index_0 < phoneOtp.length - 1) {
            focusPhoneOtpInput(index_0 + 1);
        }
    };
    const handlePhoneOtpKeyDown = (event_1, index_1)=>{
        if (event_1.key === "Backspace" && !phoneOtp[index_1] && index_1 > 0) {
            focusPhoneOtpInput(index_1 - 1);
        }
    };
    const handlePhoneOtpPaste = (event_2)=>{
        event_2.preventDefault();
        const pastedOtp = event_2.clipboardData.getData("text").replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 6);
        if (!pastedOtp) return;
        const nextOtp_0 = [
            ...emptyPhoneOtp
        ];
        pastedOtp.split("").forEach((digit, index_2)=>{
            nextOtp_0[index_2] = digit;
        });
        setPhoneOtp(nextOtp_0);
        focusPhoneOtpInput(Math.min(pastedOtp.length, 6) - 1);
    };
    const focusEmailOtpInput = (index_3)=>{
        const input_0 = emailOtpRefs.current[index_3];
        if (input_0) input_0.focus();
    };
    const handleEmailOtpChange = (value_2, index_4)=>{
        if (!/^[0-9]?$/.test(value_2)) return;
        const nextOtp_1 = [
            ...emailOtp
        ];
        nextOtp_1[index_4] = value_2;
        setEmailOtp(nextOtp_1);
        if (value_2 && index_4 < emailOtp.length - 1) {
            focusEmailOtpInput(index_4 + 1);
        }
    };
    const handleEmailOtpKeyDown = (event_3, index_5)=>{
        if (event_3.key === "Backspace" && !emailOtp[index_5] && index_5 > 0) {
            focusEmailOtpInput(index_5 - 1);
        }
    };
    const handleEmailOtpPaste = (event_4)=>{
        event_4.preventDefault();
        const pastedOtp_0 = event_4.clipboardData.getData("text").replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 6);
        if (!pastedOtp_0) return;
        const nextOtp_2 = [
            ...emptyEmailOtp
        ];
        pastedOtp_0.split("").forEach((digit_0, index_6)=>{
            nextOtp_2[index_6] = digit_0;
        });
        setEmailOtp(nextOtp_2);
        focusEmailOtpInput(Math.min(pastedOtp_0.length, 6) - 1);
    };
    const runStepTransition = async (nextText, action, options)=>{
        if ("TURBOPACK compile-time truthy", 1) {
            window.scrollTo({
                top: 0,
                behavior: "auto"
            });
        }
        setStepTransitionText(nextText);
        setIsStepTransitioning(true);
        try {
            await new Promise((resolve)=>setTimeout(resolve, 450));
            await action();
        } finally{
            if (!options?.persistLoaderAfterAction) {
                setIsStepTransitioning(false);
            }
        }
    };
    const sendPhoneOtpRequest = async ()=>{
        if (!selectedCountry || !isPhoneValid) {
            __TURBOPACK__imported__module__$5b$project$5d2f$node_modules$2f$sweetalert2$2f$dist$2f$sweetalert2$2e$all$2e$js__$5b$app$2d$client$5d$__$28$ecmascript$29$__["default"].fire("Warning", phoneValidation.message || "Please enter a valid WhatsApp number.", "warning");
            return false;
        }
        setIsSendingPhoneOtp(true);
        try {
            const displayPhone = `${selectedCountry.dialCode}${phoneDigits}`;

                countryCode: selectedCountry.dialCode

        }

            return;
        }

        if (!sent) return;
        resetPhoneOtpState();
        await runStepTransition("Opening OTP step...", async ()=>{
            setStage("phone-otp");
        });
    };
    const handleResendPhoneOtp = async ()=>{
